nasb.text: “Therefore thus says the Lord, ‘Ask now among the nations, Who ever heard the like of this? The virgin of Israel Has done a most appalling thing.

esv.text: “Therefore thus says the Lord: Ask among the nations, Who has heard the like of this? The virgin Israel has done a very horrible thing.

cnv.text: 因此耶和華這樣說： “你們問一問列國， 有誰聽見過像這樣的事呢？ 童女以色列竟行了一件非常駭人的事。

ccb.text: 因此耶和华说： “你们问问列国， 看看谁曾听过这样的事？ 少女般的以色列竟做了一件极可怕的事。
